summary:
I’ve added the missing implementation that locates “needle” in the haystack array. Apply this patch to your `index.js` (or equivalent) and then run `./test.sh` to verify everything passes:

```diff
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: index.js
@@ module.exports = function findNeedle(haystack) {
-    // TODO: your code here
-};
+    // Return the index of 'needle' in the haystack array
+    return haystack.indexOf('needle');
+};
*** End Patch
```

After saving, just run:

```bash
chmod +x test.sh
./test.sh
```

You should see all tests pass. Let me know if anything else comes up!
